geography.data_source: GHMC ward map 2020, Kukatpally zone boundary shapefiles, HUDA layout plans

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Medchal-Malkajgiri district tables, GHMC zone population estimates 2023, rapid residential growth at 3.8% CAGR

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Telangana urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, Kukatpally area employment pattern — mix of IT support and traditional occupations

commute_profile.data_source: HMR Green Line ridership 2023, TSRTC Kukatpally route data, CMP Hyderabad 2013 mode share adjusted for metro expansion

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from middle-income residential zone patterns, moderate fare sensitivity, balanced political mobilisation, Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Telangana data

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from dense apartment colony patterns, RWA-driven networks, WhatsApp colony groups as primary communication channel

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Kukatpally main road commercial strip, metro station area footfall
Estimated from KPHB Colony residential market area activity
Estimated from Kukatpally street food vendor concentration, evening market survey

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Middle Income Residential template from AGENT_SPEC.md, directly applicable — Kukatpally is a reference zone for this template

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from GHMC ward councillor count, strong RWA presence in Kukatpally apartment colonies, school density in residential zone
